source.koFillNotes: POE2DB Liquid_Emotions and individual passive pages were used to verify the source section, liquid names, passive count, and sample hash matching. Existing machine translated Korean stats were regenerated from enStats with Korean terminology patterns. Entries that could not be batch extracted from POE2DB in this environment are Korean rule translations and should be reviewed against the live site when exact official text is required.
source.koNameFixNotes: koName values containing the erroneous token 효과 were regenerated from enName. Existing koStats were not rewritten in this pass.
source.csvNameStatMatchMethod: exact English key lookup from uploaded CSV; matched enName->koName and enStats->koStats; unmatched entries kept unchanged
